chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 363 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 14-10-2021 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents No.2 to 4. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for the respondents has filed statement along with documents, which reflects that differential amount of Rs.218,133/- has been paid through cheques No.32752778 and 33436897 dated 28-07-2021 and 07-09-2021, respectively, which was calculated by the Audit Department. Accordingly, Petition has served its purpose and is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
